prompts: Cinematic medium shot, Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, warm wood interior. Kaelen Ironheart, a masculine frontline adventurer in reinforced leather armor and a bright scarf with a silver pin, presents a sealed quest parcel to Sora Mistfell, an androgynous guild crafter in a rolled-sleeve apron and brass tool belt. Kaelen holds the parcel with both hands, extending it toward Sora in a clear handoff motion. Lively guild background, soft warm anime lighting, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous guild hall shot, warm lighting. Sora Mistfell accepts the sealed quest parcel from Kaelen Ironheart’s hands. After the transfer, both characters perform a polite, slight bow to each other. The handoff is completed smoothly. Consistent character appearance and guild setting, no text, no watermark.
